alkylation reagent: alkylated with 40 mM iodoacetamide in 100 mM NH4HCO3
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 40 mM iodoacetamide in 100 mM NH4HCO3
cleavage agent: treated with 1 pM trypsin in 100 mM NH4HCO3 overnight at 37°C
collision energy: subjected to collision-induced fragmentation in the linear ion trap at normalized collision energy of 35%
instrument: subjected to nanospray LTQ XL Orbitrap MS
ionization type: characterized by electrospray ionization (ESI) MS and MS/MS
labeling: saliva samples were analyzed using SDS-PAGE
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM DTT in 100 mM NH4HCO3
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM DTT in 100 mM NH4HCO3
